narrative:
Summit County has 368,564 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.2% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.0% D−R vs +8.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
